projects.name: ClawdHub
projects.description: Terminal IDE for AI agent orchestration — 13K+ lines of Python with a rich TUI built on Textual. Manages multiple AI agents, provides real-time monitoring, and enables complex multi-step workflows from the terminal.

projects.name: Vidmation
projects.description: AI-powered YouTube video automation pipeline. Generates scripts, voiceovers, visuals, and edits — end-to-end content creation driven by Claude API and custom orchestration.

projects.name: QuickVisionz
projects.description: YOLO-based computer vision sorting pipeline for warehouse inventory. Classifies items on a conveyor belt in real-time, routing them to correct bins with >95% accuracy.

projects.name: QuickLotz WMS
projects.description: Enterprise warehouse management system handling receiving, put-away, picking, and shipping for a liquidation business. Full-stack TypeScript with real-time dashboards.

projects.name: AgentAgent
projects.description: Multi-agent orchestration system that spawns and coordinates AI agents via tmux sessions. Each agent runs independently with shared context and message passing.

projects.name: AI Schematic Generator
projects.description: Generate circuit schematics from natural language descriptions. Takes plain English input and produces valid, downloadable schematic files.

services.name: AI Engineering
services.description: Build production AI systems — RAG pipelines, agent orchestration, computer vision, LLM integration

services.name: Technical Strategy
services.description: Architecture reviews, technology selection, build-vs-buy analysis, technical due diligence

services.name: Software Engineering
services.description: Full-stack development — TypeScript, React, Python, PostgreSQL, API design

services.name: Infrastructure & DevOps
services.description: CI/CD pipelines, VPS management, monitoring, deployment automation

founder.name: Connor O'Dea
founder.background: Built 10+ ventures from first line of code to production. Specializes in AI engineering, full-stack development, and turning complex technical problems into working software.
